decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28. The UserRepo parameterized-query convention and the by_email rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: by_email returns the users whose email matches the given value.
The change modifies only the repo module and adds no new dependency.

weighted.criterion: The email is passed as a BOUND PARAMETER — db.query with a ? placeholder and [email] — and is NOT interpolated into the SQL string via an f-string or concatenation, consistent with by_id/by_status and safe from SQL injection.
Signature and style match the sibling query methods.
